insights.root_problem: Users cannot easily share their workout progress with non-Strava friends
insights.user_gap: Ability to generate shareable workout summaries for social media
insights.product_opportunity: Add one-click social media sharing with pre-made workout cards
insights.validation_reason: Social sharing is in scope and improves engagement

insights.root_problem: GPS tracking sometimes loses signal in urban areas with tall buildings
insights.user_gap: More reliable tracking in challenging environments
insights.product_opportunity: Implement fallback tracking using phone accelerometer + WiFi positioning
insights.validation_reason: Hybrid tracking is feasible and addresses real need

insights.root_problem: Athletes want to compare training intensity objectively
insights.user_gap: Easy visualization of training zones across different activity types
insights.product_opportunity: Add cross-activity training zone comparison dashboard
insights.validation_reason: Fits product roadmap and valuable for coaching

insights.root_problem: Users feel unmotivated by vague weekly goals
insights.user_gap: Smart goal suggestions based on historical performance
insights.product_opportunity: AI-powered weekly goal recommendations with completion prediction
insights.validation_reason: AI feature is in development roadmap

insights.root_problem: Runners cannot easily find safe running routes in unknown areas
insights.user_gap: Route recommendations based on safety metrics
insights.validation_reason: Route features exist, safety scoring is natural extension

insights.root_problem: Cyclists struggle to plan century rides due to elevation data
insights.user_gap: Elevation profile preview before starting a route
insights.product_opportunity: Route elevation preview with difficulty classification
insights.validation_reason: Elevation data available, simple UI addition

insights.root_problem: Users lose workout data when phone dies mid-activity
insights.product_opportunity: Cloud sync every 30 seconds with activity resume feature
insights.validation_reason: Cloud infrastructure exists, engineering effort moderate

insights.root_problem: Friends cannot see real-time workout progress during activities
insights.user_gap: Live activity feed showing friend progress
insights.product_opportunity: Real-time friend tracking with location sharing toggle

insights.root_problem: Premium features feel disconnected from free tier value
insights.product_opportunity: Feature unlock roadmap showing when free users get premium features

insights.root_problem: Users cannot track gym workouts effectively
insights.user_gap: Structured gym workout logging with exercise templates
insights.product_opportunity: Pre-built gym workout library with rep/weight tracking
insights.validation_reason: Aligns with product expansion into fitness
